scenario.name: UAS - INVITE/183/200 Load Test
scenario.send:
SIP/2.0 183 Session Progress [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[pid]SIPpTag01[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:uas@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=uas 53655765 2353687638 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=Floki Load Test c=IN IP4 [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=sendrecv

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[pid]SIPpTag01[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:uas@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=uas 53655765 2353687638 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=Floki Load Test c=IN IP4 [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=sendrecv
